logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Replace the removed javax.annotation-api dependency with jakarta.annotation-api to resolve missing classes in JDK 11.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is no longer bundled in JDK 11+ and classes like @Generated or @Nullable may be missing at compile time if not explicitly provided via the Jakarta namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release property to 11 to target Java 11 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against the default or previously configured Java version (likely 8), failing to produce Java 11 compatible bytecode or utilize Java 11 language features.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 11 APIs and bytecode; keeping 1.8 would result in incorrect target bytecode or missing language features.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Replace the removed javax.annotation-api dependency with jakarta.annotation-api.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: The javax.annotation module was removed from the JDK in Java 11, causing compile errors for classes using @Generated or other annotations from that package unless the external dependency is provided.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: While source/target still works, the release flag is the standard for Java 9+ to ensure consistent compilation against the target platform's APIs; however, this is often considered a best-practice migration rather than a strict compile failure if source/target were valid, but in the context of J8->J11 migration recipes, it is often treated as a structural breaking change to ensure correct module path resolution.
